modules.name: frontend-shell-routing
modules.purpose: Application entrypoint, route graph, lazy-loading boundaries, and page-level composition.
forbidden_changes: Do not alter auth flow semantics unless task explicitly requires it.
Do not replace lazy route boundaries with eager imports.
modules.notes: Routing regressions can break both student and tutor entry paths.

modules.name: student-domain
modules.purpose: Student-facing learning flows: chat, practice, diagnostic, homework (classic + guided chat), mini app rendering.
forbidden_changes: Do not import tutor-only modules into student pages/components.
Do not move heavy dependencies into shared UI primitives.
modules.notes: Chat path is a fragile integration point with many side effects.

modules.name: tutor-domain
modules.purpose: Tutor cabinet workflows: students, schedule, payments, homework management.
forbidden_changes: Do not break ['tutor', ...] query key conventions.
Do not remove or bypass TutorGuard behavior without explicit owner decision.
modules.notes: Tutor cache sync and role checks are tightly coupled to query key shapes.

modules.name: shared-ui-and-core-hooks
modules.purpose: Cross-cutting UI primitives, guards, navigation shell, reusable hooks and canonical types.
forbidden_changes: Do not add heavy runtime dependencies to src/components/ui/**.
Do not change AuthGuard/TutorGuard logic for unrelated tasks.
modules.notes: Changes here have broad blast radius across both product roles.

modules.name: domain-data-layer
modules.purpose: Typed API and data-access layer used by pages/hooks.
forbidden_changes: Do not change public API contracts unless explicitly requested.
Do not switch hot paths from getSession() to getUser() without approval.
modules.notes: Contract drift can silently break runtime without immediate compile errors.

modules.name: supabase-edge-telegram-runtime
modules.purpose: Telegram bot runtime, auth hooks, broadcasts, reminders, mini app companion endpoints.
forbidden_changes: Do not change command/callback contracts without explicit owner approval.
Do not change JWT verification policy in workflow/config without owner decision.
modules.notes: Operational risk is high because this module is user-facing and webhook-driven.

modules.name: supabase-edge-business-apis
modules.purpose: Edge-function APIs for homework, billing, auth-role ops, analytics, and chat backend.
forbidden_changes: Do not modify public edge function contracts unless task explicitly requires it.
Do not alter JWT policy outside owner-approved decisions.
modules.notes: Contract stability matters for frontend and external webhook integrations.

modules.name: supabase-config-and-deploy
modules.purpose: Metadata and deployment policy for edge functions, including JWT verification behavior.
forbidden_changes: Do not change verify_jwt or --no-verify-jwt semantics without explicit owner decision.
Do not assume all functions are deployed by one workflow.
modules.notes: Current deploy workflow intentionally covers only 7 functions.

modules.name: database-migrations
modules.purpose: Schema and data evolution for Postgres-backed product behavior.
forbidden_changes: Do not edit historical migrations casually.
Do not include migration changes in docs/process-only PRs.
modules.notes: Treat migration updates as separate, review-heavy PRs.

modules.name: ci-and-quality-gates
modules.purpose: CI behavior, quality gates, and command orchestration for reproducible PR checks.
forbidden_changes: Do not make lint blocking while lint debt remains unresolved without owner approval.
Do not couple deploy and quality-gate workflows into one pipeline.
modules.notes: CI should reflect current script contract and avoid unexpected merge blockers.

modules.name: automation-and-smoke-scripts
modules.purpose: Local/CI helper scripts for smoke checks and report-only drift diagnostics.
forbidden_changes: Do not convert report-only scripts into blocking checks without owner decision.
Do not introduce new dependencies for simple diagnostics.
modules.notes: Scripts should stay deterministic and side-effect-free where possible.

modules.name: documentation-and-agent-policy
modules.purpose: Human and agent guidance, architecture intent, and operational guardrails.
forbidden_changes: Do not state commands/policies that contradict package.json and workflows.
Do not remove critical safety rules without replacement.
modules.notes: Keep docs concise, precise, and aligned with executable reality.
